answers: Fashion basics: fit matters more than brand. Wear clothes that fit your body well, stick to neutral colors, and build a capsule wardrobe.
Style tip: invest in basics - plain tees, well-fitted jeans, white sneakers, and a good jacket. You can mix and match endlessly.
For men: dark jeans + white shirt + clean sneakers = classic. For women: a good blazer transforms any outfit. Keep accessories minimal.
Dress for the occasion, not the trend. Comfort + confidence = the best outfit. Find what fits YOUR body and style, not what's on Instagram.

feelings.question: how to dress well
